title: 💸 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026 🤑: A Step-by-Step Guide 📈
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Mudra Loan Apply Online
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. Get step-by-step guidance on the online application process, eligibility criteria, and required documents.
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
Step-by-Step Guide to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online

intro.heading: 🏦 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan 🤑
intro.content: The PM Mudra Loan is a government-backed loan scheme designed to support small businesses and entrepreneurs in India. The scheme provides loans up to ₹10 lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activities. In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026.

sections.heading: 📈 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan 📊
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: you should be an Indian citizen, your business should be a non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activity, and your business should be located in India. Additionally, you should have a good credit score and a stable income.

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan 📄
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to provide the following documents: identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.), address proof (passport, driving license, etc.), business proof (business registration certificate, etc.), and income proof (salary slip, income tax return, etc.). You may also need to provide additional documents depending on the lender and the loan amount.

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Guide to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online 📊
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal, click on the 'Apply Now' button, fill in the online application form, upload the required documents, and submit the application. You will receive a confirmation message and a reference number once your application is submitted. You can track the status of your application using the reference number.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies depending on the lender and the loan amount. However, the interest rate is generally lower than other types of loans.

faqs.q: How long does it take to process a PM Mudra Loan application?
faqs.a: The processing time for a PM Mudra Loan application varies depending on the lender and the loan amount. However, it typically takes 7-10 working days to process an application.
